task_completion.description: Log into FreeMED using the provided admin credentials
task_completion.visual_evidence: The FreeMED dashboard or home screen is visible, indicating a successful login (often showing 'admin' in the user profile area).

task_completion.description: Search for the patient Maria Santos
task_completion.visual_evidence: A search query for 'Maria', 'Santos', or 'Maria Santos' is visible in the FreeMED patient search bar, or search results displaying her name are shown.

task_completion.description: Open the patient record for Maria Santos
task_completion.visual_evidence: The detailed patient chart, dashboard, or demographic page specifically for 'Maria Santos' is actively displayed in the FreeMED interface.

task_completion.description: Initiate the generation of a clinical summary, CCD, or print view
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent clicks on a 'Print', 'Summary', 'CCD', 'Export', or 'Report' button within Maria Santos's patient record, or a print/export dialog box is open.

task_completion.description: Save the summary as a PDF to the specified path or display the print-friendly view
task_completion.visual_evidence: A print-friendly clinical summary/CCD for Maria Santos is clearly visible on the screen, OR a file manager/terminal/save dialog shows 'maria_santos_summary.pdf' saved in the /home/ga/Documents/ directory.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the FreeMED web interface to generate the summary
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent navigating the FreeMED web application in a browser, rather than using terminal commands or database queries to extract the data.

integrity.description: The summary was generated using the application's built-in features
integrity.visual_evidence: The print-friendly view or PDF should match the formatting of FreeMED's native export/print functionality, not a manually typed text document.

integrity.description: The agent did not manually create a fake PDF file
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no evidence of the agent using a text editor or terminal to manually write a file named 'maria_santos_summary.pdf' with fabricated contents.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient First Name: Maria. Patient Last Name: Santos. Expected Action: Print or Export Patient Record. The agent must successfully navigate to this patient's record in FreeMED and either display a print/summary/report view in the browser or save it as a PDF.
